Reshma's Bridal Studio · Ahmedabad

Artistry That Makes Your Wedding Day Unforgettable

30 years of bridal makeup and hairstyling in Ahmedabad. Internationally certified. 200+ brides last year.

9001:2015

Every look is built from scratch — for your face, your outfit, your occasion — on a long-lasting, sweat-proof base made for Indian weddings and every camera in the room.

The Founder

Reshma Shah

For 30 years, Reshma has done one thing and done it well — making brides look and feel their best on the one day that can't be redone. Last year alone, over 200 brides trusted her with that day.

She is internationally certified in makeup artistry (Advanced Institute of Aesthetics, New York), runs an ISO 9001:2015 certified studio and academy, and has been featured in Gujarat Samachar for her work.

Premium products — MAC, Huda, NARS, Dior, Charlotte Tilbury. Makeup, hair, jewellery and saree draping, done end to end, so you get ready in one place and walk out camera-ready.

📍 Ghodasar, Ahmedabad ✆ 94283 54524

The Academy

Learn from an Internationally Certified Artist

Reshma holds a Teacher Certification in Makeup Artistry from the Advanced Institute of Aesthetics, New York, and has spent 30 years perfecting bridal makeup and hairstyling. Now she teaches it.

Train on real techniques, real products, and the same standards used on 200+ brides a year. ISO 9001:2015 certified for training and services.

Enquire About Courses

The Course

Makeup & Hairstyling · 3 Months

Timing1:00 PM – 4:00 PM
MakeupBasic to Airbrush
HairstylingBasic to International
Batch size5 students
CertificateISO-marked, on completion
₹40,000 makeup + hairstyling combined
